nasb.text: But I will establish My covenant with you; and you shall enter the ark—you and your sons and your wife, and your sons’ wives with you.

esv.text: But I will establish my covenant with you, and you shall come into the ark, you, your sons, your wife, and your sons’ wives with you.

cnv.text: 我要和你立約。你可以進入方舟；你和你的兒子、妻子和兒媳，都可以和你一同進入方舟。

ccb.text: 但我要跟你立约，你与妻子、儿子和儿媳都可以进方舟。

csbs.text: 但我要与你确立我的约；你与你的儿子们、你的妻子和儿媳们要一起进入方舟。
